divergences.note: spec says max_delivery_attempts = 5; config.py says MAX_DELIVERY_ATTEMPTS = 3
code implements pickup cancellation (admin.py cancel endpoint, cancelled status); spec has no cancellation concept
spec invents delivered->archived state, archive_after config and ArchiveDeliveredParcel rule; code has no archiving
code's dispatch_parcel requires driver.can_take_route (on shift); spec's DispatchParcel has no driver eligibility guard
code returns exhausted parcels to sender (returned status, sweep job, notification); spec has no returned state or return behaviour
